title: End Food for Everyone
description: This mod modifies loot tables for shulkers, endermen, ender dragon and ender mites to include ends delights food, that was initially only dropped by killing them with a knife
body:
This datapack modifies the Loot Table of the following mobs to include Ends Delights ingredients to make food:  
      
    
*   Ender Dragon
*   Ender Man
*   Ender Mite
*   Shulkers

While this Datapack does nothing on its own, if used in tandem with Ends Delight and All the Trims it overwrites the loot tables so you can kill these mobs with anything and get something out of it.
Why All the Trims? This Datapack uses Tags. There is not a single Tag that a shield, armor, sword, staff and bow share, except for the minecraft:trim_material
As Stupid as this sounds, this is the best way to full ensure it works in Prominence.
